emails.subject: Re: PRIVILEGED and CONFIDENTIAL
emails.body: Re: PRIVILEGED and CONFIDENTIAL If this letter has not yet gone out, we should include the kitchen sink of perceived problems. I agree that the letter should be short, but lets eliminate their argument that we did not give complete notice. Kay Mann@ENRON 07/13/2000 12:13 PM
